case_title: FELISA OBREGON PEREZ VS. ALBERTO SANCHEZ CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FELISA OBREGON PEREZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ANNETTE MONTIEL-EISON. THE INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT ALBERTO SANCHEZ CASTILLO IS NOT PRESENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT RENEGOTIATED THE LOAN AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, FELISA OBREGON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ALBERTO SANCHEZ
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, FELISA OBREGON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ALBERTO SANCHEZ
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED UNTIMELY**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, FELISA OBREGON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ALBERTO SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
